CustomField.description: Checking whether the Student Visa work restriction is applied to the assigned candidate.
CustomField.formula:
IF( AND(CONTAINS(TEXT( sirenum__Contact__r.Visa_Type__c ),'500'), sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c >= sirenum__Contact__r.Study_Break_Start_Date__c , sirenum__Scheduled_Local_Start_Date__c <= sirenum__Contact__r.Study_Break_End_Date__c ), 'Student - In Study Break', IF( CONTAINS(TEXT( sirenum__Contact__r.Visa_Type__c ),'500'), 'Student (Limited Work Hours)', 'NA' )
)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field compares the Scheduled Start Date and the assigned candidate's study break dates, and tells whether the work restriction is applied or not.
CustomField.label: Work Restriction - Student Visa
